basic_details.job_title: CBI Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) Special Public Prosecutor Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website CBI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CBI Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: LLB degree. Enrolment Certificate as an Advocate with the Bar Council. Minimum 10 years standing as an Advocate with experience in handling criminal matters.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CBI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor position is 08 June 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Special Public Prosecutor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Special Public Prosecutor post in the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an LLB degree, an Enrolment Certificate as an Advocate with the Bar Council, and a minimum of 10 years of standing as an Advocate with experience in handling criminal matters.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Special Public Prosecutor role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Special Public Prosecutor position involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interaction.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this CBI recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Special Public Prosecutor position is contractual, offering a fixed-term engagement.

faq.question: Q7. In which city and state is this recruitment taking place?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the city of Dhanbad, located in the state of Jharkhand.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Jharkhand apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification specifies applications from eligible candidates in Jharkhand. It is advisable to check the official notification for any specific state-related eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this CBI recruitment is 15841/176/2/Estt/CBI/ACB/DHN.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
